/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -pthread -shared -Wl,-soname,_tf2.so -o /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/tf2_py/lib/python2.7/dist-packages/tf2_py/_tf2.so CMakeFiles/tf2_py.dir/src/tf2_py.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib -lpython2.7 /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libtf2.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librostime.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4
